title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is described as an advanced version of Claude Chat with three main improvements: unlimited file handling without size caps, larger context window capacity, and direct file output to user's computer rather than chat-based responses. The presenter demonstrates practical application through expense report generation from 100+ receipts.
